label: Enable extension "vector"
summary: Ensures the vector extension is available for pgvector operations

precheck.description: verify extension "vector" is not already enabled
precheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'vector')

execute.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'vector')

label: Create table user
summary: Creates table user with required columns

execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."user" (
  "id" uuid NOT NULL,
  "email" text NOT NULL,
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
